name: Shomer Forest — שומר היער · Citizens For Nature
description: Citizens guarding Israel's forests and wildlife. Live nature map, hazard reports (wildfire, dumping, injured wildlife, poaching), instant SOS, and a direct line to the authorities. By 3Shamrocks.Studio

shortcuts.name: SOS Emergency
shortcuts.description: Trigger an immediate nature emergency alert

shortcuts.name: Report Hazard
shortcuts.description: Quickly report a wildfire, dumping, or injured wildlife
